intended_use: VELMENI for DENTISTS (V4D) is a concurrent-read, computer-assisted detection software intended to assist dentists in the clinical detection of dental caries, fillings/restorations, fixed prostheses, a
intended_use_full: VELMENI for DENTISTS (V4D) is a concurrent-read, computer-assisted detection software intended to assist dentists in the clinical detection of dental caries, fillings/restorations, fixed prostheses, and implants in digital bitewing, periapical, and panoramic radiographs of permanent teeth in patients 15 years of age or older.
target_condition: dental caries, fillings/restorations, fixed prostheses, and implants
other_metrics: MRMC results concluded the effectiveness of V4D software in assisting readers to identify more caries and identify more fixed prostheses, implants, and restorations correctly
